tax_categories.label: General Merchandise
tax_categories.notes: Standard AL state + Jefferson County + City of Birmingham combined sales tax. Configure the current combined rate in store settings -- do not hardcode it per product.

tax_categories.label: Grocery / Packaged Food & Drink
tax_categories.notes: Alabama taxes groceries but at a reduced state rate for SNAP-eligible food items (the reduced state rate has been stepping down since 2023). Whether soda/candy qualify depends on current state rules -- confirm before relying on this label for tax calculation.

tax_categories.label: Alcohol
tax_categories.notes: Subject to Alabama ABC excise tax in addition to standard sales tax. Confirm current rates with the AL ABC Board; do not assume promotional discounts are legal for alcohol without checking ABC rules first.

tax_categories.label: Over-the-Counter Medicine
tax_categories.notes: Alabama does not generally exempt OTC drugs -- treat as taxable unless confirmed otherwise.

tax_categories.label: Prepared / Dispensed / Hot Food
tax_categories.notes: Fountain drinks, dispensed coffee, and frozen-to-hot items are often taxed differently than packaged grocery items in AL. Confirm local treatment.
